mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, start_date, end_date, role, description, tech_stack, highlights, url, visible, status, lookup_result, created_at, updated_at FROM project_experiences WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND visible = #{visible} ORDER BY start_date DESC
SELECT id FROM project_experiences WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND visible = #{visible} ORDER BY start_date DESC
